Home Make a Submission?

Salsa for Canning

Beth Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 15 c. tomatos
  • 2 green peppers
  • 1 huge sweet onion
  • 4 garlic cloves
  • 1 lrg banana pepper
  • 1 lrg cucumber
  • 1 red pepper
  • 1 yellow pepper
  • 2 c. vinegar
  • 1/2 c. lemon juice
  • 2 tbsp sugar
  • 1 tbsp cumin
  • 3 tbsp oregano
  • 1/4 c. salt
  • 1/2 bunch cilantro
  • 3 - 12oz cans tomato paste

Directions

  1. Chop all ingredients. Combine all except cilantro and tomato paste.
  2. Cook 1 1/2 hours over low heat.
  3. Add Cilantro and tomato paste.
  4. Spoon into pint jars and seal in hot water bath for 15 min.
